title: Pan-Seared Fish Fry
description: A simple and delicious fish dish, perfect for a quick dinner. The halal certified fish is pan-seared to perfection.
instructions: Rinse the fish fillets under cold water and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a shallow dish, mix together the Norwegian x-ale, tra of lemon juice, and fry seasoning.
Add the fish fillets to the marinade and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Heat the molten butter in an oven-safe skillet over medium heat.
Remove the fish from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Add the fish to the skillet and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve the fish hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Enjoy your delicious pan-seared fish fry!
